2026-04-28T16:06:17.3631024Z ##[group]Run echo "Revoking GitHub App installation token..."
2026-04-28T16:06:17.3634222Z [36;1mecho "Revoking GitHub App installation token..."[0m
2026-04-28T16:06:17.3635231Z [36;1m# GitHub CLI will auth with the token being revoked.[0m
2026-04-28T16:06:17.3636377Z [36;1mgh api \[0m
2026-04-28T16:06:17.3637014Z [36;1m  --method DELETE \[0m
2026-04-28T16:06:17.3637839Z [36;1m  -H "Authorization: token $TOKEN" \[0m
2026-04-28T16:06:17.3639825Z [36;1m  /installation/token || echo "Token revoke may already be expired."[0m
2026-04-28T16:06:17.3640744Z [36;1m[0m
